arc_function: Dual-arc supernatural investigation: Part A (chapters 1-14) establishes campus legend mystery through ritual gone wrong, escalating to betrayal confrontation and time-locked curse deadline; Part B (chapters 15-26) transitions protagonist to overseas setting for new supernatural investigation involving cursed artifact, identity deception, and exorcism climax.
dominant_engine: Investigation-driven supernatural horror with progressive evidence chain revelation; protagonist uses forensic deduction and memory analysis to separate supernatural truth from corrupted folklore; romantic subplot functions as emotional anchor and misdirection device throughout both arcs.
state_progression: Protagonist resists supernatural involvement → reluctantly drawn into investigation → develops analytical methodology → becomes primary investigator → faces betrayal and mortality stakes → survives first arc with unresolved questions → relocates to new location → confronts identity deception → achieves partial resolution while maintaining supernatural threat ambiguity

turning_points.function: Betrayal confrontation: co-conspirators turn on each other under supernatural pressure; death of antagonists shifts protagonist from investigator to survivor with implied curse continuation
Arc transition: primary mystery resolved, villain dead, new supernatural theory proposed; protagonist relocates geographically creating narrative reset while maintaining character continuity
Identity twist climax: romantic partner exposed as non-human entity through knowledge-inconsistency reveal; romantic investment recontextualized as manipulation trap

setup_payoff_rhythm: Two-beat pattern: each mystery arc follows setup (environmental foreshadowing, legend establishment, physical evidence introduction) → investigation (witness testimony, artifact analysis, deduction sequences) → confrontation (direct antagonist encounter) → resolution with ambiguous supernatural implications. Payoff delayed across multiple chapters through information withholding between characters.
reusable_mechanisms: Reluctant protagonist drawn into supernatural event through social pressure from female ally
Prophecy delivered through supernatural medium as cryptic partial message creating forward hook
Failed ritual creates ongoing threat rather than clean resolution—horror persists beyond ritual frame
Time-locked commitment creates urgency—characters must act by specific deadline
Legend investigation sequence: folklore prompts physical investigation at described location
Character reputation subversion: timid person reveals hidden competence under pressure
Coerced testimony via feigned involvement to manipulate authority figure
Surface resolution with immediate character doubt—solving one layer reveals deeper question
Evidence chain revelation: physical discovery followed by emotional/supernatural response creates two-part payoff
Legend corruption motif: folklore preserves distorted version of true events requiring investigation to separate
Investigation structure: infiltration of restricted space, methodical search, record analysis leading to deduction
Complementary investigation pair with distinct roles (one confronts, one provides emotional access)
Witness coordination: ally provides information gathering while protagonist provides analysis interpretation
Mystery expansion: investigation circle widens when secondary characters announce independent knowledge
Companion becomes possessed or influenced at the exact location of the mystery
Confession-as-backstory delivery: character recounts entire history through dialogue under interrogation pressure
Ghost physically interacts with living world—active supernatural rather than passive haunting
Shared recurring dream serves as curse exposition device delivered to multiple characters
Memory tampering deduction: using physical evidence to prove supernatural interference with human recollection
Knowledge-inconsistency reveal: character exposes antagonist through demonstrating impossible expertise
Double-fake structure: both helper and love interest are the same antagonist
Romance-as-misdirection: intimate scenes build reader expectations that identity-twist subverts
Protective haunting: ghost's malevolent reputation turns out to mask self-sacrificing protection
Environmental anomaly discovery plants for future explanation
failure_modes: Extensive pre-plot exposition in opening chapter creates pacing issues and risks reader attrition
Backstory structure front-loaded before primary narrative begins—reader must survive exposition before hook
Heavy reliance on romantic subplot may alienate readers expecting pure mystery
Protagonist's manipulative dialogue could alienate readers if not balanced with sympathetic moments
Multiple mystery layers introduced in single chapter may dilute focus on central question
Genre shift whiplash: abrupt tonal transition from expository resolution to visceral horror may alienate readers
Deus ex machina resurrection without established rules undermines previous sacrifice stakes
Protagonist becomes passive listener rather than active agent during exposition-heavy scenes
Systematic rules established for curse may make future supernatural threats feel predictable
Narrator admits to fabricating evidence and destroying physical proof, undermining reader trust

craft_profile.pov_distance: First-person retrospective narrator dominates Part A with direct reader address creating conversational intimacy and temporal distance between experienced self and narrating self. Part B shifts to third-person limited maintaining protagonist interiority while reducing meta-fictional framing. Dual-layer first-person used during witness testimony sequences where frame narrator receives testimony from witness.
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Alternates between long cumulative sentences building dread and short declarative sentences for shock impact. Investigation sequences use compound sentences with multiple subordinate clauses describing conditions, actions, observations. Horror climax compresses into short staccato fragments mimicking panicked breath. Dialogue remains clipped and character-revealing while exposition tends toward run-on sentences building atmosphere.
craft_profile.paragraphing: Excessively long initial paragraphs for world-building and backstory; shifts to shorter scene-driven paragraphs once action begins. Dialogue-heavy exchanges use short alternating paragraphs facilitating rapid back-and-forth. Horror sequences use single-sentence paragraphs to isolate single sensations. Extended dialogue paragraphs for backstory delivery create reading momentum.
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Character voice differentiated through content and syntax rather than physical description. Protagonist uses measured analytical tone with self-deprecating humor; female allies use casual expressions and emotional reasoning. Information delivered through character questions answered by witnesses—protagonist asks leading questions, subject provides reveals through reluctant answers. Competitive dialogue where characters argue while revealing information simultaneously.
craft_profile.description_method: Atmospheric buildup through vague foreboding before concrete details. Relies on emotional reaction (cold sweat, chill along spine, physical sensations of fear) rather than visual horror. Physical sensations prioritized over visual inventory during crisis. Environmental details filtered through protagonist's current psychological state rather than neutral observation. Sensory specificity creates visceral impact during horror reveals.
craft_profile.exposition_method: Worldbuilding through character knowledge rather than authorial explanation. Legend details emerge through reluctant admissions and interrupted explanations. Protagonist thinks through logic aloud allowing necessary information to emerge naturally without obvious info-dump. Companion asks obvious questions prompting protagonist to explain. Information gated by character's willingness creating dramatic access control.
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Cryptic message delivered through supernatural medium itself creates both resolution and new mystery. Chapter endings use forward-looking hooks: external event interruption rather than internal revelation, creating momentum through incoming event rather than mystery deepening. Final ghost warning operates as imperative prophecy with ambiguity about referent creating existential dread.
craft_profile.transition_method: Scene breaks marked by time markers and physical movement between locations. Present investigation frame leads to emotional manipulation leads to past event narration leads to present reaction leads to new present mystery. Past events framed as transcription of testimony with witness delivering backstory under pressure.

arc_function: Supernatural investigation arc centering on a haunted building's death pattern mystery, interwoven with romantic subplots and escalating supernatural threat escalation to climactic triple-death confrontation and antagonist reveal.
dominant_engine: Statistical anomaly investigation combined with supernatural threat manifestation through ordinary objects; mystery deepening through witness testimony and document evidence; romantic tension through love triangle competition structure.
state_progression: Transition from previous arc (concluding puppet event), establishing new investigation framework
Supernatural encounter introduction through mundane dare, replacing ordinary life concerns
Investigation team formation through coercion and shared evidence discovery
Haunted building exploration with spatial puzzle mapping and character disappearance subplot
Mystery deepening through supernatural marker identification (apple obsession connecting victims)
Backstory revelation through confession and flashback, revealing psychological manipulation origins
Confrontation escalation through physical intrusions and supernatural manifestation
Climactic ritual confrontation with antagonist reveal and multiple deaths
Horror vignette transition with unresolved doorbell cliffhanger

turning_points.function: Statistical anomaly reveal that all 137 deaths occurred in five specific rooms, establishing the core mystery engine
Witnessed character death confirming supernatural possession mechanism, raising stakes from mystery to personal vendetta
Supernatural manifestation begins through mirror ritual, transitioning from mystery investigation to active horror threat
Triple-death climax with antagonist reveal and ritual confrontation, delivering major plot payoffs while establishing next arc stakes

setup_payoff_rhythm: Chapters alternate between investigation setup (evidence discovery, witness testimony) and payoff delivery (revelation, death, confrontation). Key patterns: statistical anomaly (ch32) → evidence validation (ch45); apple obsession (ch36) → death confirmation (ch38); love triangle setup (ch40) → competition confrontation (ch44); backstory exposition (ch42) → antagonist reveal (ch50). Approximately 8-10 chapter cycles between major setup and payoff delivery.
reusable_mechanisms: Statistical anomaly discovery creating impossible patterns that suggest supernatural selection rather than random distribution
Witness testimony validation through physical evidence confrontation, creating rational-investigation-into-irrational-supernatural tension
Group investigation structure with coerced participation and divided party mechanics
Character disappearance subplot with voluntary departure misdirection and footprint forensics deduction
Backstory delivery through confession-as-weapon or embedded flashback within present-day scene
Supernatural manifestation through ordinary object defamiliarization (apple, mirror, clock)
Love triangle formalization with explicit competition stakes and physical intimacy interruption
Environmental sensory disruption (cold, dread, wrong sounds) preceding supernatural entity introduction
Forced deadline escalation as commitment device raising participant stakes
Phantom room or liminal space that exists only under specific temporal conditions
Romantic vulnerability as manipulation weapon or information extraction mechanism
Layered deception with character lying for unclear reasons creating inconsistent testimony requiring investigation
failure_modes: Information dump through document reading or character monologue overwhelming action pacing
Multiple character deaths in compressed timeframe diminishing emotional impact per death
Protagonist unreliable narration creating reader distrust of investigation conclusions
Simultaneous introduction of multiple supernatural elements diluting focus and threat intensity
Mystery deepening without resolution accumulating reader frustration across chapters
Comedic relief scenes creating tonal whiplash disrupting horror atmosphere
Extended exposition scenes breaking action momentum in climactic chapters
Large character ensemble creating protagonist centrality dilution and tracking burden
Phantom room mechanics functioning as unexplained plot cheats if not consistently grounded
High emotional intensity scenes without sufficient recovery periods exhausting reader investment

craft_profile.pov_distance: Close first-person narration with sardonic self-awareness; reader occupies protagonist's analytical lens completely while internal monologue admits manipulation and emotional blindspots. Protagonist evaluates other characters' credibility in real-time, creating deliberate unreliable narrator effect.
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Alternating short declarative sentences for action and horror beats against longer flowing sentences for exposition and internal reflection. Dialogue sequences use staccato exchanges with interruptions; investigation sequences employ interrogative chains. Climactic scenes fragment sentences for disorientation.
craft_profile.paragraphing: Single-line paragraphs isolate dramatic beats and revelations. Extended dialogue blocks unbroken by narration during confession scenes. Scene breaks unmarked aside from whitespace and hard cuts. Dense sensory paragraphs during horror sequences versus sparse functional description during investigation scenes.
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Conversational with subtext; characters speak around mysteries rather than explaining them directly. Sardonic deflection from protagonist contrasts with performative politeness from antagonists. Tag dialogue with action beats rather than pure attribution. Q&A structures drive investigation sequences.
craft_profile.description_method: Atmosphere built through absence rather than presence—missing sounds, missing light, missing life. Physical details sparse but evocative with single striking features per character. Supernatural elements described through physiological response (cold, dread, paralysis) before visual confirmation. Psychological states externalized through body reactions.
craft_profile.exposition_method: Embedded through protagonist's analytical breakdown of data or evidence. Backstory delivered through reluctant character confession or document reading. Information bound to current scene urgency rather than abstract exposition. Witness testimony validated through physical evidence confrontation rather than acceptance.
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapters end on unanswered questions, escalating threats, or cliffhanger actions rather than resolution. Revelation hooks use isolated single-sentence paragraphs for emphasis. Supernatural hooks employ sensory anomaly accumulation before explicit threat statement.
craft_profile.transition_method: Scene breaks through external interruption (phone call, physical intrusion) rather than character decision. Time markers explicit but brief. Hard cuts between emotional beats matching genre convention. No soft transitions between tonal registers.

arc_function: Second supernatural investigation arc with dual geographic settings (Chinese village → Japanese urban) and curse-expansion mechanics. Volume completes Black Mountain Town arc while transitioning to Takahashi family storyline, establishing cross-volume continuity through black box artifact and protagonist's worsening curse timeline.
dominant_engine: Supernatural mystery engine driven by protagonist's personal curse deadline creating external investigation urgency. Each geographic location contains embedded supernatural folklore that protagonist's rationalist framework initially rejects before accumulated evidence forces acceptance. Antagonist identity remains unstable through multiple reveals (double-agent reversal, disguised mastermind) maintaining reader uncertainty about ally/enemy classification.
state_progression: Protagonist recruited into closed-room murder investigation through skill gap (ch52)
Investigation reveals supernatural elements contradicting rationalist assumptions (ch54-55)
Protagonist forced into romantic proximity with female lead through supernatural threat (ch56)
Alliance formation against common threat with protective relationship development (ch57-58)
Antagonist's true agenda revealed through betrayal mechanism (ch62)
Arc resolution with protagonist curse confirmed worsening (ch64)
Protagonist departure and Japan arc initiation through supernatural weather anomaly (ch65)
Fake marriage contract establishing new resource access and romantic stakes (ch68)
Takahashi family conspiracy deepened through inheritance competition (ch69)
Supernatural threat confirmed through death investigation (ch70)
Arc resolution with protagonist curse cycle continuing (ch74)
New feng shui mystery arc initiated through environment anomalies (ch75-76)

turning_points.function: Major twist: victim is 86-year-old with age discrepancy, establishing serial killer connection and protagonist's illegal investigation methodology
Genre transition from rationalist investigation to confirmed supernatural horror through ghost girl identity reveal
Tonal pivot from horror to romance through intimate dialogue scene; supernatural mechanism (black cat blood) revealed with 24-hour deadline creating urgency
Betrayal revelation: ally was double-agent working with mastermind; protagonist trapped in gasoline ambush; corpse discovered in cave climax
Arc resolution with antagonist fate (corpse embrace drowning) and curse confirmation (protagonist now experiences nightmares); Japan arc transition
Fake marriage contract signed; dual black box curse mechanisms fully explained (apple-touch killing, seven-day sleep zombification, nightmare beheading)
Supernatural threat confirmed through frozen corpse forensics; rationalist debunking scene deliberately undermined by physical evidence
Ghost identity revelation (antagonist dead throughout), fox wedding mechanics explained, curse cycle confirmed continuing into next arc
Supernatural anomaly confirmed through physical evidence (fish eyes, lion reorientation) with elder authority validation

setup_payoff_rhythm: Each supernatural arc follows investigation → anomaly detection → rationalist dismissal → escalating evidence → confrontation → resolution with new mystery initiation pattern. Payoff density varies: chapter 54 delivers single major twist, chapter 62 delivers triple reveal (double-agent, trap, corpse location), chapter 64 provides high-density payoff (antagonist death, curse explanation, protagonist status update). New mysteries introduced exceed resolutions, creating perpetual forward tension.
reusable_mechanisms: Closed-room murder mystery with missing head/weapon and non-professional investigator recruitment
Supernatural entity masquerading as vulnerable human needing rescue with wounds mysteriously absent
Weather anomaly as story-mode transition signal (ordinary rain → anomalous sun rain)
Environmental inconsistency reveals supernatural tampering (dry ground vs claimed rain, wrong moon phase)
Black box Deux ex machina with ironic timing for protagonist rescue
Character revelation through contrasted public/private behavioral discrepancy
Nested deception pattern where both parties know they are being used but proceed
Protagonist intellectual defense mechanism during supernatural crisis (cultural knowledge, multilingual cursing)
Dream sequence used to externalize psychological state and foreshadow real events
Interrogation scene with power dynamic reversal and philosophical debate
Physical comedy lowering romantic tension before emotional vulnerability reveal
Protagonist's rationalist framework forced to process impossible evidence through internal debate
Beneficiary identification through inheritance law logic as murder motive
Supernatural causal retribution mechanism replacing legal justice
Layered mystery expansion: personal problem expands into larger mystery with unknown scope
Forensic observation through environmental change (current vs remembered conditions)
Trap-within-discovery: successful investigation leads directly into prepared ambush
Grief-weaponized climax: emotional breakdown serves as narrative climax after action tension resolves
Identity reveal through comparison of behavioral patterns and biographical details
Environmental anomaly investigation with expertise demonstration establishing credibility
Elder authority figure confirming impossible claims at critical moment
False-calling mechanic: misinterpretation creates comedic tension before horror payoff
failure_modes: Protagonist's manipulative personality and intellectual hubris may alienate readers expecting sympathetic protagonist
Heavy reliance on dialogue for exposition delivery creates information density risks
Mid-arc position with perpetual unresolved mysteries may frustrate readers seeking closure
Genre-transition pivots (horror → romance, comedy → horror) require careful tonal calibration to avoid jarring
Protagonist committing crimes (breaking/entering, theft) for investigation may normalize problematic behavior
Supernatural threat requiring mechanical explanation risks reducing mystery to puzzle-solving
Multiple background mysteries (black boxes, apple event, fox wedding) may fragment reader attention
Information withholding through narrator's future-regret voice creates unreliable narrator tension
Protagonist's irrational chase behavior may frustrate readers expecting competent-protagonist genre expectations
Investigation methodology relies on illegal evidence collection potentially inadmissible
Third-act reveals of character identity or death status retroactively reinterpret previous scenes
Successive antagonist reveals may exhaust reader capacity for trust evaluation

craft_profile.pov_distance: Intimate first-person narration with direct access to protagonist's thoughts, motivations, and self-aware assessment of his own manipulative nature. Reader perceives information exactly as protagonist perceives it including blind spots. Occasional future-regret framing creates dramatic irony where narrator's predictions prove incorrect. Protagonist's rationalist voice colors all descriptions; objective reality never provided directly.
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Varied between reflective philosophical passages (longer compound sentences with logical connectors) and rapid dialogue exchanges (short declarative fragments). Action and danger sequences compress into staccato fragments creating physiological stress response mimicry. Investigation passages employ measured sentences simulating methodical thinking. Rhythm deliberately erratic during supernatural events to simulate disorientation.
craft_profile.paragraphing: Short paragraphs (1-3 sentences) reserved for tension beats and reaction moments. Extended blocks for investigation reasoning and emotional processing. Dialogue without attribution tags during rapid exchanges to maintain pace. Scene breaks marked by location changes and time markers rather than explicit dividers. Blank space between major revelations creates visual emphasis.
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Characters identified through speech patterns rather than attribution tags. Protagonist's sarcasm conveyed through word choice and self-aware narration. Antagonists deliver exposition through lecturing tone establishing power dynamics. Information exchanges disguised as banter or confrontation rather than explanation. Questions punctuated by dramatic pauses build tension before answers.
craft_profile.description_method: Sensory-first rather than visual-first during horror: touch, temperature, and sound prioritized. Environmental details selected for supernatural implication rather than comprehensive setting. Physical sensations (trembling, cold crawl, pounding heart) convey emotional states. Supernatural elements described through effects rather than direct explanation. Minimal external description during dialogue-heavy scenes.
craft_profile.exposition_method: Background delivered through character's own speech or behavior rather than narrator summary. Protagonist's cultural knowledge appears naturally during action (cultural references as curses). Complex backstory delivered through antagonist's perspective with selective revelation. Information density controlled through urgency and question-answer patterns rather than infodumps.
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter endings operate through multiple mechanisms: unanswered questions in ellipsis format, promise of revelation, tonal dissonance (comedy following horror), or physical danger cliffhanger. Each scene ends with new revelation or question pulling to next. Misdirection through red herrings requires reader patience with apparent dead-ends.

arc_function: Resolve Shen family supernatural conspiracy (mirror entity, blood-drinking plants, buried grave) while transitioning to Lu Yu tomb archaeological mystery arc
dominant_engine: Supernatural horror investigation with rationalist first-person narrator; mystery structure driven by information asymmetry and multi-thread clue convergence
state_progression: Mystery setup phase: three divergent anomaly clues converge on copper lion as central artifact (ch.77-78)
Investigation expansion: forbidden area exploration, mirror horror escalation, love triangle resolution (ch.79-83)
Supernatural mechanism revelation: cursed mirror backstory, feng shui mythology, blood magic system established (ch.84-91)
Crisis intensification: possession symptoms, false-location conspiracy, antagonist motivation revealed (ch.92-96)
Convergence and resolution: murder mystery solved, supernatural threat explained, emotional climax (ch.97-98)
Genre transition: story pivot to archaeological mystery, new characters, Lu Yu tomb premise (ch.99-101)

turning_points.function: Multiple independent anomaly threads unified at single temporal node; copper lion established as core investigation anchor
Foundational revelation reframes entire spatial premise: current residence is not original Shen family home
Antagonist confession humanizes threat while revealing blood ritual mechanics; near-kiss interruptions signal romantic stakes
Complete supernatural mythology exposition: buried grave entity, Sun family grave-keeper role, blood-sucking plant network
Murder mystery resolved; genre contract violation pivots from supernatural horror to historical literary fiction
Childhood friend transformation payoff; new arc premise (Lu Yu tomb discovery) formally introduced

setup_payoff_rhythm: Alternating revelation density: every 2-3 chapters of mystery expansion followed by 1 chapter of payoff/comedy relief; recurring horror imagery (mirror reflection, copper lion orientation, blood smell) gains meaning incrementally through delayed exposition
reusable_mechanisms: Multiple clues converging at same temporal node to强化因果暗示
First-person rationalist narrator confronting supernatural through pseudo-scientific rationalization
Sensory-anchored horror: smell/temperature/tactile wrongness preceding visual confirmation
Mirror as supernatural conduit: reflective surface distorts reality, allows entity interaction, creates visual absence (headless reflection)
Environmental anomalies as threat indicators: out-of-season flowering, animal behavior change, light transformation
Dialogue-driven exposition with reluctant confessor mechanics
Comedic interlude insertion between horror sequences for tonal breathing room
POV expansion for antagonist backstory confession while protagonist remains restrained/helpless
Body horror through biological corruption: roots replacing bones, blood flowing uphill, plant growth consuming flesh
Discovery sequence structured as incremental scale surprises
failure_modes: Information density overload: five+ simultaneous mysteries introduced without resolution bandwidth
Rationalist narrator self-deception blocking reader identification: keeping dangerous specimens, dismissing obvious supernatural evidence
Unmarked POV shifts causing reader disorientation mid-chapter
Genre contract violations: horror-to-comedy-to-historical-fiction tonal whiplash
Cliffhanger dependency creating resolution fatigue and trust erosion
Possession/subplot mechanics risk reading as victim-blaming narrative
Antagonist monologue pacing: extended confession sequences risk reader abandonment
Genre-specific cultural exposition (feng shui terminology, Chinese folklore) limits cross-cultural applicability
Supernatural rules introduced late without consistent rule application causing plot convenience accusations
Extended flashback/digressions (Buddhist fable, philosophical tangents) stall narrative momentum

craft_profile.pov_distance: Strict first-person limited through protagonist consciousness; external events filtered through analytical interpretation; occasional unmarked POV expansion for antagonist backstory confession; close psychological proximity maintained even during horror sequences
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Staccato fragments for crisis/horror beats alternating with long flowing sentences for exposition and reflection; compression during tension builds urgency, expansion during recovery creates breathing room; pattern mimics breath-like narrative pulse
craft_profile.paragraphing: Single-sentence paragraphs isolate horror revelations and emotional punches; extended multi-sentence paragraphs carry exposition and backstory; dialogue-heavy scenes use minimal attribution for pacing acceleration; white space functions as emotional pause marker
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Conversational with frequent interruption and incomplete thoughts; characters distinguished by speech register (formal/archaic for authority figures, sardonic for narrator, fragmentary for emotional crisis); exposition delivered through questions rather than volunteered information; confession scenes use sustained monologue uninterrupted by protagonist
craft_profile.description_method: Sensory priority: smell (blood, osmanthus), temperature (cold, warmth), tactile wrongness precede visual confirmation; environmental detail sparse and functional rather than scenic; horror described through impossible physical details rather than fear vocabulary; female character physicality described through narrator's visceral reactions creating reader discomfort
craft_profile.exposition_method: Information gaps drive revelation; reluctant confessor mechanics justify extended backstory delivery; riddle-answer structure unlocks larger revelation when expertise demonstrated; comparison to historical precedent (27-year case) establishes pattern without full explanation; embedded mythology through character dialogue rather than omniscient summary
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter-end hooks distributed across three levels: plot悬念 (what happened),推理悬念 (how clues connect),情感悬念 (relationship fate); different levels alternate to maintain continuous pull; closing revelation delivered as calm declarative statement to maximize cognitive dissonance
craft_profile.transition_method: Environmental shifts (silence, light change, temperature drop) signal supernatural threshold crossings; physical movement through space triggers scene changes; time markers (explicit clock timestamps) anchor timeline during investigation sequences; tone shifts marked through prose register change (comedic → ominous) rather than explicit breaks
do_not_copy: Chinese cultural terminology and specific feng shui concepts require replacement
Character names and relationship labels must be anonymized
Author-specific verbal tics ('嘿嘿' laughter, '木头' character type, '啧啧' interjections)
Philosophical essay openings using famous quotations as thematic framing
Repeated kiss-interruption pattern with identical mechanics
Self-referential author commentary at chapter end
Internet novel website signatures and meta-commentary
Percentage statistics as pseudo-scientific foundation
Anatomically detailed female body descriptions through male gaze

arc_function: Convergence and revelation arc where multiple mystery threads (supernatural corpses, ancient tea saint mythology, mysterious organizations, terminal diagnosis ticking clock) intersect and begin yielding answers while simultaneously opening larger cosmological questions. Emotional climax (濒死求婚) coexists with investigative breakthroughs, establishing that the supernatural threat operates across historical and modern timelines through shared obsessive love triangles. The volume pivots from pure mystery to supernatural horror with philosophical undertones.
dominant_engine: Emotional ticking-clock hybrid driving both romantic stakes (7-day terminal diagnosis motivating proposal) and investigative urgency (comatose character as living mystery requiring cure). Mystery revelation engine powered by physical evidence chain (速写本笔迹演变→茶叶来源→崔淼儿 inscription→古书真伪) that links modern anomalies to historical secrets. Supernatural horror engine introduces botanical-vampire hybrid threat and Life Spiral technology as cosmological framework.
state_progression: Initial state: Forced reconciliation with antagonist, supernatural coffin mystery established, emotional confrontation imminent
State 1: Antagonist psychological interiority revealed through captivity monologue, love triangle tension escalated with kidnapping leverage
State 2: Protagonist traumatic backstory delivered via disorienting dream sequences, romantic betrayal wound exposed through surreal temporal displacement
State 3: Impossible crime (glass broken from inside sealed coffin) solved, mysterious recurring antagonist introduced with matching intellect
State 4: Terminal diagnosis revelation (7-day ticking clock) transforms from death sentence to mission framework
State 5: 濒死求婚 emotional climax achieved through mutual oath exchange, horror setup via dual opening vignettes (僵尸/吸血鬼), 金娃娃番外 independent horror unit
State 6: Painting authentication paradox + museum theft revelation connecting previously separate threads
State 7: 崔淼儿 discovered as 陆羽's secret lover through coffin inscription, personal stakes established via Zhang Ke obsession with her name
State 8: Epistolary flashback reveals Zhang Ke's vulnerability and romantic history, supernatural threat introduced at emotional climax
State 9: Origin story flashback subverts romance into horror reveal, protagonist's nightmare source explained, new antagonist Ye Buyu introduced
State 10: Physical evidence investigation (速写本/茶叶/书法) links Zhang Ke to 陆羽 through 崔淼儿, window horror anomaly discovered
State 11: Cross-POV horror (Zhao Qian'er escape) intersects with botanical-supernatural mechanism (corpse plant growth), embedded document advances backstory
State 12: 古书 acquisition ritual, 茶经真伪 verification, 窃听器 reversal, underground-within-underground mystery
State 13: Black market auction reveals 100M USD bid and 皇甫三星 as buyer, money-laundering cover theory proposed
State 14: 《茶经》 ten-section exposition, Wuzhen expedition preparation, Professor Mayo antagonist profile established
State 15: 杨俊飞 backstory revealed, Life Spiral/Oscillation pseudo-science explained, protagonist-antagonist alliance formed
State 16: Three-parallel paranormal vignette setup (prison vengeance/watching presence/haunted mirror), author-protagonist meta-narrative role introduced
State 17: Investigation resolution with physical evidence deduction, genre pivot from thriller to horror memoir, epistolary epilogue providing emotional closure

turning_points.function: Terminal diagnosis revelation transforms narrative stakes from mystery-only to life-or-death urgency, converting protagonist into active agent with limited time rather than passive investigator

Emotional climax achieved through 濒死求婚 that establishes romantic payoff alongside mystery plot, fundamentally redefining protagonist's motivation framework from self-preservation to relationship affirmation

崔淼儿 discovery through coffin inscription creates direct historical-modern parallel that reframes all subsequent investigation as personal rather than purely academic, adding emotional weight to supernatural mystery
Life Spiral revelation provides cosmological framework unifying supernatural elements, while protagonist-antagonist alliance shifts narrative from solo investigation to collaborative pursuit

setup_payoff_rhythm: Volume employs three-layer setup-payoff structure: (1) Immediate payoffs within 1-3 chapters (coffin mystery solved Ch105, 崔淼儿 discovered Ch109, 窃听器 reversal Ch114); (2) Delayed payoffs spanning 5-10 chapters (terminal diagnosis consequence realized through expedition Ch116, romantic backstory referenced in proposal Ch107, origin story implications in main timeline Ch111); (3) Long-arc payoffs deferred to future volumes (Life Spiral full implications, 皇甫三星 true agenda, supernatural cosmology complete rules). Mystery compound technique keeps multiple crimes/mysteries at different payoff stages simultaneously.
reusable_mechanisms: Physical evidence chain linking modern anomalies to historical secrets through forensic analysis (笔迹演变→茶叶来源→inscription)
Emotional ticking-clock with specific countdown (7-day diagnosis) converting terminal state into active mission framework
濒死求婚: terminal diagnosis triggering active proposal from traditionally passive romantic party
Dual narrative structure: present investigation alternating with historical romance mirror (陆羽-崔淼儿 paralleling modern characters)
Supernatural threat introduced during emotional vulnerability peak (Zhang Ke's climactic cry interrupted by window shadow)
Romance-to-horror subversion: beloved memory revealed as nightmare source through origin story flashback
Parallel vignette structure introducing multiple horror premises simultaneously before convergence
物证串联法: multiple seemingly unrelated artifacts (速写本,茶叶,书法) pointing to same historical figure
Authentication paradox: multiple verification methods yielding contradictory results creating higher-tier mystery
Embedded personal document (letters/short story) advancing backstory while creating dramatic irony
Genre pivot mid-chapter from rational investigation to visceral horror using investigative logic as scaffolding
Expert consultation breaking protagonist's logical impasse through domain knowledge
Antagonist profile escalation: documented past actions establishing credibility rather than vague description
Confession through proxy: using fictional/historical quote to introduce thematic content
Ticking clock with unknown cause maintaining mystery alongside physical threat
Historical cameo with character assassination providing reader reward and establishing protagonist's unusual agency
Dream-sequence as emotional flashback delivery creating false-memoir texture through sensory detail
Comic relief strategically placed before major revelations for pacing management
Dramatic irony construction: showing reader what character cannot see, forcing helpless observation
Mystery deepening through revelation: new information raising questions rather than answering them
failure_modes: Genre ambiguity: abrupt switches between mystery, romance, horror, and supernatural thriller may confuse reader expectations if not clearly signaled
Heavy exposition ratio: technical content (《茶经》 structure, Life Spiral theory, 笔迹心理学) risks becoming infodump if not embedded in character conflict
Multiple simultaneous mysteries accumulating rather than resolving may frustrate readers seeking closure
Dream sequence length may test reader patience if emotional content not sustained through surreal passages
Antagonist internal monologue reliance risks reader disengagement if villain perspective not sufficiently compelling
First-person/第三人称混合使用 in structural experiments may create POV inconsistency confusion
Parallel vignette setup delays central narrative momentum until convergence
Historical figure inclusion requires accuracy maintenance and reader interest in tangentially related content
Female character agency reversal (passive to competent action) requires earlier establishment to avoid deus ex machina perception
Ticking clock mechanism requires visible protagonist action to deliver on emotional hook, not just revelation

craft_profile.pov_distance: 第一人称亲密视角 during emotional scenes and investigation; close third-person for analytical sequences; distant third-person past-tense for Zhao Qian'er scenes creating observational remove; First-person lyrical opening patterns for philosophical content; POV shifts without transition bridges relying on chapter structure demarcation
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: 短促句式 for tension and action beats creating urgency; 长复合句链 for emotional climax allowing time to settle; staccato fragments for horror impact and shock moments; varied length within dialogue for natural speech patterns; clinical short declaratives for forensic observation contrasting with emotional passages
craft_profile.paragraphing: 单句独立成段 for impact beats and visual pauses; dense multi-sentence blocks for scene-setting and emotional reflection; dialogue-heavy sections using single-line paragraphs for rapid back-and-forth; white space as structural signal between POV shifts and scenes; 超长段落不换段 in proposal climax creating temporal stasis
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Socratic debate style for theory explanation; 双独白交叉结构 for emotional confrontation where each character owns complete expression periods; interrupted confession pattern for emotional disclosure; character explaining concepts to surrogate audience naturally delivering exposition; comic relief through naive character ignorance; minimal dialogue during present-tense action, extended dialogue only in dream/memory sequences
craft_profile.description_method: Selective detail focused on mystery-relevant elements only; psychological description via somatic metaphor (goosebumps, throat constriction, muscle tremor); environmental description only when serving emotional function; sensory wrongness prioritized over physical inventory for horror elements; contrast手法 (nine years ago vs now) suggesting time passage through character appearance; clinical forensic detail (尸斑, 尸斑, 尸斑) establishing genre credibility
craft_profile.exposition_method: Character dialogue as primary delivery vehicle; internal reasoning serving as exposition naturally revealing backstory organically; TV show/embedded document double-duty for character development and mystery information; no omniscient narrator info-dump; information unpacked through characters asking questions and authorities answering
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Each paragraph ending with material anchor point (specific object) rather than abstract suspense; double revelation beats in succession creating impact layering; unfinished thought cliffhangers maintaining forward momentum; four-paragraph multi-hook structure (proposal/history/番外/序章) with each ending on distinct suspense type
craft_profile.transition_method: Abrupt cuts between scenes without scene-break markers; sensory dissociation bridging reality and dream; physical action serving as scene break (receiving call, running to location); geographic/spatial displacement as temporal marker; timestamp markers for temporal clarity; season/cimate verse citations for historical-modern jumps; 直接标注 (四天后) for time jumps; physical sensations bridging narrative layers
